en: This loss is a burden that we both share. Two sinners can atone from a lone prayer.
ko: 이 상실은 우리 둘 다 나누는 짐이야. 두 죄인이 외로운 기도로 속죄할 수 있어.

en: Souls tied, intertwined by pride and guilt.
There's darkness in the distance. From the way that I've been living.
ko: 저 멀리 어둠이 있어. 내가 살아온 방식 때문에.

en: But I know I can't resist it.
ko: 하지만 거부할 수 없다는 걸 알아.

en: Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time.
You and I drink the poison from the same vine.
ko: 너와 나는 같은 덩굴에서 독을 마셔.

en: Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time.
Hiding all of our sins from the daylight.
From the daylight, running from the daylight.
Oh, I love it and I hate it at the same time.
